name: io.github.praveendias1180/easypaydirect-mcp
description: Read-only MCP server for the Easy Pay Direct (EPD) / NMI-family payment gateway Query API.

environmentVariables.name: NMI_SECURITY_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Gateway API security key (a read-only key is recommended).

environmentVariables.name: NMI_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Gateway API base URL; defaults to https://secure.nmi.com. Set to your EPD / white-label host.
